technologies.name: vscode
technologies.description: Visual Studio Code is Microsoft's popular source-code editor that has become the de facto standard for code editing. It supports debugging, syntax highlighting, intelligent code completion, snippets, code refactoring, and integrated Git. With 182k GitHub stars, it is one of the most widely adopted development tools globally.

technologies.name: linux
technologies.description: The Linux kernel is the core component of the Linux operating system, managing hardware resources, system calls, process and memory management, and file systems. It powers the vast majority of servers, supercomputers, Android devices, and cloud infrastructure worldwide.

technologies.name: AutoGPT
